commit_scope: Promote the Windows Hati-OS floor to a canonical windows-x86_64 target while preserving windows-amd64 as a compatibility alias, and prove the expanded target catalog four-way on fkwu.

commands: subagent Erdos: reran verify_windows_fkwu_self_jit.ps1, fourth-arm-gate, focused validate, and git diff --check
local_validation.notes: The verifier reported PASS windows-fkwu-self-jit cold=317811 hot=317811 njit=26 and FLOOR target=windows-x86_64 alias=windows-amd64 runtime=fkwu-self-jit-no-runtime-toolchain bootstrap_pe_coff=form-native-pending. The fourth-arm gate reported PASS-4WAY hati-os-targets. Focused validate reported verdict 524287 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent. git diff --check passed with CRLF warnings only. The first verification sub-agent Cicero stalled before running commands and made no edits; the second sub-agent Erdos independently ran all four commands successfully and made no edits.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet; PR CI has not run for this branch.

commands: Hostinger Auto Deploy on main after merge
deploy_validation.notes: This slice changes Form target catalog, proof naming, docs, and evidence only. Public route behavior is unchanged before merge.

phase_gate.gate: Windows x86_64 must be a first-class Hati-OS target floor with the same fkwu self-JIT runtime proof and honest MLX refusal as the existing Windows amd64 compatibility row.
phase_gate.next: Rebase, run local PR gates, push branch, open PR, monitor CI, then merge only if checks pass.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The catalog now exposes windows-x86_64 as the canonical Windows PE/COFF target while retaining windows-amd64 as a compatibility alias. The runtime verifier names target=windows-x86_64 alias=windows-amd64, and the Form target band proves the expanded catalog four-way on fkwu at verdict 524287.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form/fkwu runtime and target catalog; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Run the Windows fkwu self-JIT verifier and assert cold=317811, hot=317811, njit>0, and target=windows-x86_64 alias=windows-amd64.
Run the hati-os-targets fourth-arm gate and assert PASS-4WAY.
Run focused Form validation over hati-os-targets and assert verdict 524287 with fourth arm attached.
Run independent sub-agent validation over the same checks and confirm no edits were made.
